title: Adult mental health and wellbeing profile: November 2025 update
body: "The adult mental health and wellbeing profile:   supports understanding of adult mental health and wellbeing at a local level supports an intelligence-based approach to service planning, commissioning and delivery provides a set of indicators that allow planners, providers and stakeholders to profile their area and benchmark against similar populations   The November 2025 update includes new data on secondary mental health services on:   new referrals attended contacts inpatient stays   The adult mental health and wellbeing profile is classified as official statistics in development. "
